title: allotriepiskopos #0244
definition:
1) one who takes the supervision of affairs pertaining to others
    and in no wise to himself, a meddler in other men's affairs
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) one who takes the supervision of affairs pertaining to others
    and in no wise to himself, a meddler in other men's affairs

    NASB:  one who meddles in things alien to his calling:
